emails.subject: Re: Representations for ISDA Transaction
emails.body: Hi Sara, I have attached the blank ISDA template that created for EWEB. The "Other Provisions" section has been highlighted in yellow so you can add special language. Thank You, Kimberly Hundl x31647 From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 04/18/2001 10:57 AM
